name: Arm & Hammer Double Chip Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 and 2/3 cups (10 oz. package) Peanut Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat together butter or margarine, sugar, brown sugar, and vanilla extract until well combined.
2. Add eggs to the mixture; beat well until incorporated.
3. Stir flour and baking soda in a separate bowl, then blend into the sugar mixture.
4. Mix in peanut butter and chocolate chips until evenly distributed.
5. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F for 8 to 10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
7. Allow cookies to cool slightly on the baking sheet before transferring them to a wire rack.
8. Cool completely before serving. Makes about 5 dozen cookies.
